fields.Name: text-chat
fields.Description: Text-chat interaction channel — the trivial engine that wraps every direct BaseAgent.Run() invocation, so analytics, run records, and future per-channel prompt overrides apply uniformly to text and voice.

fields.Name: voice-cascaded
fields.Description: Cascaded voice pipeline: STT → LLM → TTS. Suitable for any agent whose LLM is fast enough to TTFT under the channel's latency budget. Barge-in handled by VAD + interrupt signal.

fields.Name: voice-realtime
fields.Description: Unified speech-to-speech channel: a single bidirectional model handles audio in and out (gpt-realtime, Gemini Live, ElevenLabs Conv AI, PersonaPlex). Lowest latency path; tool calls route through BaseAgent via either native or hand-off-to-llm strategy.

fields.Name: phone
fields.Description: PSTN bridge channel. Routes to a cascaded or realtime engine depending on the configured bridge (Twilio ConversationRelay, Twilio Media Streams, or LiveKit SIP).

fields.Name: video-realtime
fields.Description: Skeleton placeholder for future video-realtime channels. The engine class exists but throws 'not yet implemented'. Reserved so metadata, config-type validation, and transport contracts are forward-compatible.
